channel.title: Rosa Luxemburg Foundation – English
channel.description: Latest news and publications from the Rosa Luxemburg Foundation (English)

item.title: Congo's Minerals Power the World. Why Are Its People Going Hungry?
item.description: The DRC supplies cobalt for EV batteries, smartphones, and the green transition. But little remains for the local economy.

item.title: Gaza’s Food Sovereignty Crisis
item.description: In Gaza, the hungry forage for food while farmers and seed keepers struggle to preserve Palestinian agriculture

item.title: Chile under Kast: Pinochet's Neoliberalism Returns
item.description: One hundred days after the new president took office, opposition is beginning to take shape

item.title: Dispatches From Gaza: Return Us to Ourselves
item.description: Palestinian writer Ali Abu Yassin on the silent war - life after the ceasefire

item.title: Forcing Refugees To Return to Syria is a Bad Idea
item.description: German chancellor Merz wants Syrians gone. But Syria's shattered economy can't absorb forced returns.

item.title: Bolivia: Between Legitimate Protest and Economic Strangulation
item.description: What is driving the latest wave of protests and road blockades?

item.title: How Rapper Balen Shah Is Reshaping Nepal's Politics
item.description: After Gen Z protests toppled the government, Nepal has elected its youngest-ever Prime Minister

item.title: Hyrasia One: Kazakhstan's Green Hydrogen Mega-Project
item.description: Germany is driving the hydrogen project - but Kazakh communities and ecosystems might pay the price

item.title: Understanding Albania’s Flamingo Revolution
item.description: How a Jared Kushner real estate project became a rallying point against crony capitalism

item.title: Social Democracy - or Pragmatic Conservatism?
item.description: After record-breaking negotiations, Denmark has a new minority coalition government.
